codeReview.summary: Digest-backed refresh-token and password-reset-token persistence is implemented consistently: new records store only `token_digest`, legacy raw-token rows remain readable during rollout through digest-first fallback plus startup backfill, and the targeted auth token suites plus broader validators passed.

summary: PASS. The feature removes reusable stored bearer secrets from refresh/reset persistence while preserving existing auth contracts and transition behavior for legacy rows.
